title: Animal Origins - Infinite Origins
description: An origins mod addon that includes six different animal based origins with balanced and fun mechanics! Available for both forge and fabric!
body:
![Animal origins big logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55464549735e66307f997d9b02b5d3c94e85213c.png)
![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45309898e4acb00c685efcca2be31644dca24a94.png)

The animal origins mod includes 6 new different origins as an addon to the origins mod!. These are:

**Penguin:** coming from frosty biomes, these birds have sacrificed their ability to fly in order to survive in the cold. However, they are expert swimmers and sliders, which makes them one of the bests hunters underwater.

**Reptilian:** descendants of dinosaurs, these cold bloded creatures have adapted to survive in the dangerous world.

**Monkey:** Rulers of the jungle and cousins of the humans, these mammals have a great mobility but not a big brain.

**Kangaroo:** These mammals have strong legs and a pouch to store things.

**Chameleon:** Masters of camouflage, these reptiles are hard to be spotted.

**Roadrunner:** Fastest origin out there. Their heritage allows them to run really, really fast.

# **CURRENT ORIGINS:**
![Penguin description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ca35096e8908d227cac66a0fa59a67e88406320.jpeg)
![Reptilian description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a8b13223fc7f2748bd06b6be01d3ca66e06084b.jpeg)
![Monkey description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8350cd5e5d0aca119053029c20aca33e9ce6364.jpeg)
![Kangaroo description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7427abf449d4a33fb6927cb4965c522e9fa1ee7f.jpeg)
![Chameleon description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20a73af13f39eae4e563dfbac5b062548644b72d.jpeg)
